title: Functions should not return the same value for every call
description: Functions should not be designed to return the same value for every call. This can lead to unnecessary duplication of code and potential bugs.
message: Function should not return the same value for every call.
recommendation: Return different values based on inputs.

compliant.description: Returns different values based on inputs

why_is_this_an_issue: Functions that always return the same value can lead to unnecessary duplication of code and potential bugs.
how_to_fix: Return different values based on inputs.

logic.new_check_type_doc: Checks if function returns the same value every time. This assumes that the function body is a single expression.

metadata.title: Functions should not return the same value for every call
